# Hg's Portfolio

Systems architecture notes, blog posts, and systems blueprints (deployment, Docker, edge AI, ops).

Site: https://hgq287.github.io/
Sitemap: https://hgq287.github.io/sitemap.xml

## Citation

When quoting, attribute to Hung Q. Truong and link to the specific article URL.
